todayStoryline.headline: France face Morocco in Boston
todayStoryline.subtitle: Gillette Stadium kick‑off 21:00 UK / 16:00 ET; heavyweight international test

facts.home: Kylian Mbappé grew up in Bondy, where his father coached local youth club AS Bondy.
facts.away: Several Morocco internationals were developed in Dutch academies, reflecting strong diaspora links.

news.headline: EU leaders discuss migration policy options
news.body: European Union leaders held talks on new measures to manage migration and asylum flows. The meeting focused on burdensharing and border controls, with no final agreement reached.

footerNote: All times converted from official kickoffs
